word: G1958 - ἐπιμέλεια - epiméleia - ep-ee-mel'-i-ah - + refresh self

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιμέλεια

- Transliteration: Epimeleia

- Phonetic: ep-ee-mel'-i-ah

- Definition:

1. care, attention

- Origin: from G1959

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G1959; carefulness that is kind attention (hospitality): - + refresh self.
